stages.name: Search & Discover
stages.description: The problem hits. They go to Google or AI platforms and search for immediate solutions. SEO, PPC, and LSAs determine who gets seen first.

stages.name: Evaluate & Compare
stages.description: They check reviews, scan your website, compare you against 2–3 competitors. Review volume, rating, and website quality win or lose the job.

stages.name: Validate & Decide
stages.description: Before calling, many check social media for recent activity, look for industry peer recommendations, or ask AI for a second opinion.
